caption: A man wearing a green baseball cap, large black over-ear headphones, and a green t-shirt with the text "ION NEVER DO SHIT" across the chest sits in front of a professional microphone. He is in a room with walls decorated with framed photographs and a clothing rack visible in the background, where a white mannequin wears a white shirt. Red and white logos, including one that reads "BODILY" and "TORT," are overlaid on the bottom of the scene. As the sequence progresses, the man shifts his gaze and facial expression, moving from looking forward with a neutral expression to blinking and slightly tilting his head while maintaining a pensive look. He remains seated and stationary relative to the microphone and the background throughout the clip.
